title: Cleaning Quality Control Executive
description:
Job Description & Responsibilities:

  • Ensure all cleaning operations strictly follow company Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and industry standards
  • Conduct routine and random site inspections to assess cleanliness, hygiene standards, and staff performance
  • Maintain comprehensive records of inspection results, issues identified, and actions taken
  • Report service gaps and operational issues promptly to the Resident Manager and Operations Team
  • Collaborate with the Operations Team to implement corrective and preventive actions (CAPA)
  • Identify recurring issues and support continuous process improvements to enhance cleaning quality
  • Assist in reviewing and updating SOPs as needed
  • Provide on-the-ground support during audits or client site visits
  • Recommend and coordinate retraining sessions for cleaning staff when quality standards are not met
  • Participate in onboarding and training sessions for new cleaning personnel, focusing on quality standards
  • Investigate and document customer complaints, determine root causes, and recommend resolutions
  • Track and analyze trends in inspection data to propose improvements and reduce non-conformance rates
  • Ensure availability and proper use of cleaning materials and equipment as per standards
  • Support the evaluation and implementation of new cleaning tools, products, or technologies
  • Foster a culture of accountability and excellence in cleaning performance across all teams

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma holder; Fresh graduates are welcome to apply
  • Strong observational, reporting, and analytical skills
  • Bilingual preferred (spoken and written) to effectively communicate with diverse teams
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint
  • Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work independently and as part of a team
  • Detail-oriented with a proactive approach to problem-solving

postedCompany.description:
BESTWAY CLEANING SERVICES PTE LTD offers accumulated experience and expertise in provision of cleaning services to the private sector comprising commercial, residential and industrial projects, since our formation.

We are registered with the Building and Construction Authority (BCA) under the financial grade of L6 for Housekeeping, Cleaning & Conservancy. We take pride in delivering quality products and services to our clients. Your satisfaction is our top most priority.

BESTWAY also prides itself in being able to meet standards set by industry professionals. All of our workers are train by our in-house training centre and have gone through training and are certified by approved training institutes under the Singapore Workforce Development Agency (SWDA) Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) frameworks. We believe in continuous learning and invest heavily in our human capital by sending them for training and skills upgrading courses, striving to achieve a more engaging workforce.

Moreover, we have achieved ISO9001:2008 certification in 2013. This shows our commitment in providing excellent service and maintaining our competitive edge by innovating our work processes.

BESTWAY also believes in looking out for the welfare of our workers. Being an avid advocate for workplace safety and health policies, BESTWAY attained OHSAS18001:2007 and Bizsafe Star certifications on 2013.

By obtaining ISO 14001 certification in 2013, BESTWAY play its parts toward the environmental. Use the reduce, reuse and recycle approach to make tangible cost reductions as well the potential to reduce taxes and liability insurances
postedCompany.name: BESTWAY CLEANING SERVICES PTE LTD
